positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic mountain landscape at sunrise. The foreground silhouette consists of various abstract flora and fauna (deer, fox, geometric mountains, simplified evergreen trees) set against a vibrant, gradient sky. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep ultramarine, burnt orange, pale sky blue, and slate grey. The composition must be centered, emphasizing strong negative space and clear, crisp outlines suitable for screen printing. Highly detailed vector art aesthetic, flat graphic design, stylized, ethereal, naturecore.
negative: blur, out of focus, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, realistic, hyperdetailed photo, low contrast
